title: AISC 360-22 Bolt Group Capacity
description: Design bolt groups in accordance with AISC 360-22.

shape.description: Bolt Pattern. Symbol: \text{Pattern}. Bolt Pattern Shape.

diameter.description: Diameter. Symbol: \text{Diameter}. Units: in. The diameter of the bolt pattern.

angle.description: Rotation. Symbol: \text{Angle}. Units: °. Angle to rotate the bolt pattern by. 0 degrees is defined to have a bolt at the top of the center of the circle.

circular_bolts.description: No. Bolts. Symbol: n. The number of bolts in the circular pattern.

s_c.description: sc. Symbol: s_c. Units: in. Spacing of bolt columns (spacing in X).

s_r.description: sr. Symbol: s_r. Units: in. Spacing of bolt rows (spacing in Y).

x_bolts.description: No. Bolt Columns. Symbol: n_c. The number of bolt columns (in X direction).

y_bolts.description: No. Bolt Rows. Symbol: n_r. The number of bolt rows (in Y direction).

bolts_table.description: Bolt Coordinates. Coordinates of all bolts to be considered.

L_eh.description: Edge Distance (X). Symbol: L_{eh}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in X direction.

L_ev.description: Edge Distance (Y). Symbol: L_{ev}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Y direction.

L_ehl.description: Edge Distance (Xleft). Symbol: L_{eh,left}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Xleft direction.

L_evb.description: Edge Distance (Ybottom). Symbol: L_{ev,bottom}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Ybottom direction.

L_ehr.description: Edge Distance (Xright). Symbol: L_{eh,right}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Xright direction.

L_evt.description: Edge Distance (Ytop). Symbol: L_{ev,top}. Units: in. Minimum spacing between centre of bolts and plate edge in Ytop direction.

plate_width.description: Plate Width (W). Symbol: W. Units: in. Total Width of the plate (length in X).

plate_height.description: Plate Height (H). Symbol: H. Units: in. Total Height of the plate (length in Y).

t.description: Plate Thickness (t). Symbol: t. Units: in. Thickness of smallest steel plate in the connection.

grade.description: Bolt Grade. Symbol: \text{Grade}. Bolt Grade is related to the ultimate tensile strength (fu) of the bolt (see Table J3.2)

f_ub.description: fub. Symbol: f_{ub}. Units: ksi. Ultimate tensile strength of bolt. Related to grade of bolt (see Table J3.2 and commentary).

shear_plane.description: Shear Plane. Symbol: \text{Shear Plane}. Specify if the plane in which the bolts are sheared passes through the shank or the threaded portion of the bolt. The threaded portion has a smaller cross-sectional area and may be selected for a conservative design (reflected in Fnv value).

bolt_type.description: Bolt Type. Symbol: \text{Bolt Type}. Slip-Critical or bearing type bolt. Slip-Critical option only availbe for bolt sizes and grades with a pretension specified in Table J3.1.

faying_surface.description: Faying surface. Symbol: \text{Faying}. Class used for slip-critical bolt calculations (See Section J3.9).

n_s.description: No. Slip Planes. Symbol: \text{Slip Planes}. Number of slip planes required for connection slip (Cl J3.9).

n_fillers.description: No. Fillers. Symbol: \text{Fillers}. Number of Fillers between connected parts (See Fig C-J3.3).

plate_grade.description: Plate Grade. Symbol: \text{Plate Grade}. Plate Grade is related to the plate yield and tensile stress (see AISC steel construction manual Table 2-5).

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_{y}. Units: ksi. Yield strength of the steel plate (see AISC steel construction manual Table 2-5).

f_u.description: fu. Symbol: f_{u}. Units: ksi. Ultimate tensile strength of the steel plate (see AISC steel construction manual Table 2-5).

grip_length.description: Grip Length. Symbol: \text{Grip}. Units: in. Grip Length required for A307 bolts to meet the requirements of Table J3.2.

treatment.description: Treatment. Symbol: \text{Treatment}. Details about steel treatment for corrosion protection required for max bolt spacing requirements.

exposure.description: Corrosion. Symbol: \text{Corrosion}. Details about steel exposure to corrosion required for max bolt spacing requirements.

hole.description: Hole Type. Symbol: \text{Hole}. Bolt Hole Type. Slotted holes only available for rectangular bolt pattern.

clearance.description: Nominal Hole Clearance. Symbol: clearance. Units: in. Nominal hole clearance for bolts (see Table J3.4).

d_h.description: Hole Size (dh). Symbol: d_h. Units: in. Size of hole.

d_l.description: Slot Length. Symbol: L. Units: in. Length of slotted hole.

hole_deformation.description: Hole Deformation. Symbol: \text{Deformation}. Bolt hole deformation consideration for determining bearing and tearout resistance (section J3.11 AISC 360-22).

end_loading.description: Connection Type. Symbol: \text{Connection}. Connection type for shear strength reduction consideration (see table J3.2).

plate_connection_type.description: Plate Connection Type. Symbol: \text{Connection}. Number of plates that are connected to the plate being considered in design. Used for assessing block shear requirements.

prying_method.description: Prying Analysis. Symbol: \text{Prying}. Method for calculating the impact of prying on tensile loads. Must be supplied as simplified factor for circular and custom bolting arrangements.

prying_factor.description: Prying Factor (p). Symbol: p. Factor to account for prying effect by increasing tensile loads. A value of 1.1 may be suitable for rigid plates and a value of 1.2 to 1.4 may be suitable for flexible plates.

stub_thickness.description: Stub Thickness. Symbol: t_{stub}. Units: in. Thickness of stub in inches considered for prying action calculation.

Fx.description: Fx. Symbol: F_x. Units: kip. Applied design action along X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fy.description: Fy. Symbol: F_y. Units: kip. Applied design action along Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Fz.description: Fz. Symbol: F_z. Units: kip. Applied design action along Z-axis. A positive value is considered to apply tension to the bolts. A negative value is considered to apply compression.

Mx.description: Mx. Symbol: M_x. Units: kip-ft. Design moment about X-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

My.description: My. Symbol: M_y. Units: kip-ft. Design moment about Y-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

Mz.description: Mz. Symbol: M_z. Units: kip-ft. Design moment about Z-axis. Negative value reverses the load direction.

graph_on.description: Show Stress Graphs. Toggle on/off to show stress graphs in reporting. Disabling stress graphs will result in quicker solve times.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
